zh.lifeSummary: Martin Pfattheicher於1601年出生在德國海因里希_維斯普斯多伊奇 可洛卡爾茲盧。他於大約1630年與Barbara Zimmerman在德國巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧史額可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1675年11月8日在德國享年74歲，埋葬在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧史額可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Martin Pfattheicher于1601年出生在德国海因里希_維斯普斯多伊奇 可洛卡爾茲盧。他于大约1630年与Barbara Zimmerman在德国巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧史額可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1675年11月8日在德国享年74岁，埋葬在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧史額可。

nameMeanings.name: Martin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Latin name Martinus. This was probably originally derived from Mars (genitive Martis), the name of the Roman god of war (and earlier of fertility). Martin became very popular in the Middle Ages, especially on the Continent, as a result of the fame of St Martin of Tours . He was born the son of a Roman officer in Upper Pannonia (an outpost of the Roman Empire, now part of Hungary), and, although he became a leading figure in the 4th-century Church, he is chiefly remembered now for having divided his cloak in two and given half to a beggar. The name was also borne by five popes, including one who defended Roman Catholic dogma against Eastern Orthodox theology. He died after suffering imprisonment and privations in Naxos and public humiliation in Constantinople, and was promptly acclaimed a martyr by supporters of the Roman Church. Among Protestants, the name is sometimes bestowed in honour of the German theologian Martin Luther ( 1483–1546 ); Martin was used as a symbolic name for the Protestant Church in satires by both Dryden and Swift. A further influence may be its use as the given name of the civil-rights leader Martin Luther King ( 1929–68 ).

en.lifeSummary: Martin Pfattheicher was born in 1601, in Karlsruhe, Deutsch Krone, West Prussia, Prussia, Germany. He married Barbara Zimmerman about 1630, in Spöck, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, Germany. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 8 November 1675, in Germany, at the age of 74, and was buried in Spöck, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden.

fr.lifeSummary: Martin Pfattheicher est né en 1601, à Karlsruhe, Deutsch Krone, Prusse Occidentale, Prusse, Allemagne. Il a épousé Barbara Zimmerman environ 1630, à Spöck, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 8 novembre 1675, à Allemagne, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Spöck, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden.

de.lifeSummary: Martin Pfattheicher wurde 1601 in Karlsruhe, Deutsch Krone, Westpreußen, Preußen, Deutschland geboren. Er hat um 1630 in Spöck, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, Deutschland Barbara Zimmerman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 8. November 1675 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Deutschland und wurde in Spöck, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden begraben.

Lui sposato Barbara Zimmerman circa 1630, nel Spöck, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 8 novembre 1675, nel Germania, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Spöck, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden.

ja.lifeSummary: Martin Pfattheicherは1601年にドイツプレウssンウエストプレウssンデウトッシュ クロンカルルスルヘで生まれた。約1630年にドイツバデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘスプoックでBarbara Zimmermanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1675年11月8日にドイツで74歳で死去し，バデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘスプoックにて埋葬された。

ko.Kreis, Karlsruhe, Baden-Wuerttemberg, Pr: 독일 프레우ss 웨스트프레우ss 데우츠치 크론 칼스루헤
ko.lifeSummary: Martin Pfattheicher(은)는 1601년 독일 프레우ss 웨스트프레우ss 데우츠치 크론 칼스루헤에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1630년 독일 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 스poc크에서 Barbara Zimmerman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1675년 11월 8일 독일에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 스poc크에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Barbara Zimmerman aproximadamente 1630, em Spöck, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 8 de novembro de 1675, em Alemanha, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Spöck, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden.

ru.lifeSummary: Martin Pfattheicher родился в 1601 г. в местности карлсрух, деуцч кроун, вестпреуssен, Пруссия, Германия. Он женился на женщине по имени Barbara Zimmerman около 1630 г. в местности спoкк, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 8 ноября 1675 г. в местности Германия в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности спoкк, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден.
